prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document relates primarily to health guidance for individuals in contact with Crimean-Congo haemorrhagic fever and is issued by the UK Health Security Agency, primarily targeting users in England. It does not specifically address protocols or guidelines set by the devolved health authorities in Scotland, Wales, or Northern Ireland.
